span.p:
Is there an environment-scoped
policy on its home env?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is the env in scope of a tenant-wide
policy that EXCLUDES specific envs?

span.p: Is there a catch-all tenant-wide policy?

span.p:
No DLP — every connector implicitly Business
fix this: author a tenant floor
